chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-874 of 2025 Const. Petition No. D-875 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing: 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA No.4671/25 3. For hearing of main case. 26.08.2025. Mr. Kashif Khan Tanoli, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Deepar, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with I.O. Asad Ali Korani, Addl. Director ACE Sindh. ------------------------------------ I.O. /Addl. Director ACE Sindh present in court states that a status quo order has been granted by the District Court in Civil Suit and as such he is not able to continue his inquiry. Under these circumstances, these petitions are hereby disposed of alongwith pending applications as the proceedings are still pending before the Civil Court. Office to place copy of this order in connected matter. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
